tree.cn: 提比和她的动物朋友们
tree.notes: Tippi introduces her animal friends in her book.

children.text: Tippi: "Hi, I'm Tippi. Look! This is my book."
children.cn: 提比：“你好，我是提比。看！这是我的书。”
children.notes: Tippi introduces herself and her book.
children.statement: Tippi is showing us her book.
children.explanation: 提比说：看！这是我的书（Look! This is my book.）。
提比的朋友是动物（animal friends）。

children.text: This is Abu. He is an elephant. He is big and strong. I love him.
children.cn: 这是阿布。他是一头大象。他高大又强壮。我爱他。
children.explanation: 阿布是一头大象（He is an elephant.）。

children.text: This is Leon. He is a chameleon. He is small.
children.cn: 这是莱昂。他是一只变色龙。他很小。

children.text: This is Linda. She is an ostrich. She is fast.
children.cn: 这是琳达。她是一只鸵鸟。她跑得很快。
children.explanation: 琳达是一只鸵鸟（She is an ostrich.）。

children.text: This is Mufasa. He is a little lion. He is cute.
children.cn: 这是木法沙。他是一只小狮子。他很可爱。
children.explanation: 木法沙很可爱（He is cute.）。

children.text: They are my animal friends. I love them.
children.cn: 它们是我的动物朋友。我爱它们。
children.explanation: 提比说她爱它们（I love them.）。
